name: Linguine Stir-Fry with Green Beans & Garlic
recipeIngredient: 1 pound linguine, spaghetti, or thin spaghetti
1 pound skinless boneless chicken breast, slivered
1 pound green beans, trimmed and halved
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare Pasta according to package directions; drain.
2. In a large nonstick wok or skillet over high heat, heat 1 teaspoon vegetable oil. Add chicken and stir-fry about 4 minutes until firm and opaque. Remove chicken and set aside.
3. Add the remaining teaspoon of vegetable oil to the pan. Add green beans; reduce heat to medium, cover, and cook for 7 minutes. Uncover, add red bell pepper, and stir well for an additional 5 minutes. Add garlic and stir-fry for 30 seconds.
4. Stir in teriyaki sauce and chicken broth. Heat to a simmer; toss with chicken and pasta. Serve immediately.
